name: ten-four
title: Ten Four
description: A shelf of clean, copyable snippets pushed from your terminal or Claude Code. "10-4, copy that": copy them out of Raycast with pristine formatting, no mangled line breaks.
author: jaymcc

commands.title: Ten Four Shelf
commands.subtitle: Copy that
commands.description: Browse and copy snippets pushed to your shelf

commands.name: install-cli
